subcodes.first_line: I came into the presence of the Throne on a certain night and stood before it for the space of twenty minutes or thereabouts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضرت لدی العرش فی لیله من اللیال کنت قائما فی الحضور مقدار عشرین دقیقه او
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
